{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Internal Countrol Accountant",
  "description": "GMYT Group is a multi-division organization driving excellence in Fashion Academy, Retail, Hostel, and Foundation. We tell bold stories through visuals and need a creative who can bring our brands to life.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Internal Countrol Accountant

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We&rsquo;re hiring a detail-oriented, systems-focused Lead Accountant to manage our financial health, controls, and growth across all GMYT entities.


Key Responsibilities


	Financial Management &amp; Progression: Prepare monthly/quarterly financial statements, cash flow, P&amp;L, and management reports. Drive financial planning for growth.
	Budgeting &amp; Authorization: Develop annual budgets for Group + subsidiaries. Review, authorize, and control all expenditures in line with policy.
	Inventory &amp; Store Accounting: Oversee stock valuation, costing, reconciliations, and cycle counts for retail/store operations. Ensure zero leakage.
	Controls &amp; Compliance: Enforce internal controls, approval matrices, and audit readiness. Ensure tax, pension, and statutory compliance.
	Process Improvement: Build financial systems, SOPs, and reporting dashboards that give leadership real-time visibility.


Requirements


	Education: BSc / HND qualification in Accounting, Finance, or related field. ACA / ACCA / CPA is a strong advantage.
	Experience: 4&ndash;10 years of progressive accounting experience, with at least 3 years in a lead / supervisory role.
	Skills: Proven experience managing inventory/store accounting, budgeting, financial authorization, and driving financial progression in an SME/multi-entity setup. Advanced Excel + accounting software required.
	Traits: High integrity, analytical, deadline-driven, and able to challenge the status quo.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV + Cover Letter to: hr4gmyt@gmail.com , CC: hr4gmytfashionacademy@gmail.com using &quot;Lead Accountant &ndash; Your Full Name&quot; as the subject of the email.

Note


	Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
	Deadline: Until the position is filled.
	GMYT Group is an equal opportunity employer.
	We value fairness, excellence, and accountability.

Internal Countrol Accountant Job at GMYT Group




        
    

        
        GMYT Group is a multi-division organization driving excellence in Fashion Academy, Retail, Hostel, and Foundation. We tell bold stories through visuals and need a creative who can bring our brands to life.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Internal Countrol Accountant

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We’re hiring a detail-oriented, systems-focused Lead Accountant to manage our financial health, controls, and growth across all GMYT entities.


Key Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Financial Management & Progression: Prepare monthly/quarterly financial statements, cash flow, P&L, and management reports. Drive financial planning for growth.
	Budgeting & Authorization: Develop annual budgets for Group + subsidiaries. Review, authorize, and control all expenditures in line with policy.
	Inventory & Store Accounting: Oversee stock valuation, costing, reconciliations, and cycle counts for retail/store operations. Ensure zero leakage.
	Controls & Compliance: Enforce internal controls, approval matrices, and audit readiness. Ensure tax, pension, and statutory compliance.
	Process Improvement: Build financial systems, SOPs, and reporting dashboards that give leadership real-time visibility.


Requirements


	Education: BSc / HND qualification in Accounting, Finance, or related field. ACA / ACCA / CPA is a strong advantage.
	Experience: 4–10 years of progressive accounting experience, with at least 3 years in a lead / supervisory role.
	Skills: Proven experience managing inventory/store accounting, budgeting, financial authorization, and driving financial progression in an SME/multi-entity setup. Advanced Excel + accounting software required.
	Traits: High integrity, analytical, deadline-driven, and able to challenge the status quo.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV + Cover Letter to: [email protected] , CC: [email protected] using "Lead Accountant – Your Full Name" as the subject of the email.

Note


	Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
	Deadline: Until the position is filled.
	GMYT Group is an equal opportunity employer.
	We value fairness, excellence, and accountability.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Website Developer & Manager",
  "description": "GMYT Group Limited - We&rsquo;re committed to equipping aspiring fashion entrepreneurs with practical skills and business knowledge to thrive in the fashion industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Website Developer &amp; Manager
Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	We are seeking a skilled Website Developer &amp; Manager to build, maintain, and optimize our digital platforms, ensuring seamless performance across all GMYT websites.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop, update, and manage all GMYT websites including e-commerce, corporate, and landing pages
	Ensure websites are responsive, fast, secure, and SEO-optimized
	Manage CMS platforms such as WordPress, Shopify, and custom-built sites
	Implement updates, plugins, security patches, and backups regularly
	Troubleshoot technical issues and ensure 99%+ uptime
	Collaborate with Marketing, ICT, and Branding teams to deploy new features and campaigns
	Monitor analytics, site performance, and user experience to drive continuous improvement
	Maintain domain, hosting, and SSL certificate renewals


Requirements


	Minimum 3 years of experience in web development and management
	Proven experience as a Website Developer / Manager with portfolio of live sites
	Strong proficiency in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, and at least one modern framework
	Hands-on experience with WordPress, Shopify, and other CMS platforms
	Knowledge of SEO best practices, Google Analytics, and performance optimization tools
	Familiarity with web hosting, cPanel, Git, and basic server management
	Problem-solving mindset, attention to detail, and ability to meet deadlines


What We Offer


	Competitive salary based on experience
	Opportunity to lead GMYT&rsquo;s digital presence across multiple brands
	Collaborative and growth-oriented work environment.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV, portfolio links, and brief note on your web management experience to: hr4gmytfashionacademy@gmail.com using &quot;Application &ndash; Website Developer &amp; Manager&quot; as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",

Website Developer & Manager Job at GMYT Group Limited




        
    

        
        GMYT Group Limited - We’re committed to equipping aspiring fashion entrepreneurs with practical skills and business knowledge to thrive in the fashion industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Website Developer & Manager
Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	We are seeking a skilled Website Developer & Manager to build, maintain, and optimize our digital platforms, ensuring seamless performance across all GMYT websites.


Key Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Develop, update, and manage all GMYT websites including e-commerce, corporate, and landing pages
	Ensure websites are responsive, fast, secure, and SEO-optimized
	Manage CMS platforms such as WordPress, Shopify, and custom-built sites
	Implement updates, plugins, security patches, and backups regularly
	Troubleshoot technical issues and ensure 99%+ uptime
	Collaborate with Marketing, ICT, and Branding teams to deploy new features and campaigns
	Monitor analytics, site performance, and user experience to drive continuous improvement
	Maintain domain, hosting, and SSL certificate renewals


Requirements


	Minimum 3 years of experience in web development and management
	Proven experience as a Website Developer / Manager with portfolio of live sites
	Strong proficiency in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, and at least one modern framework
	Hands-on experience with WordPress, Shopify, and other CMS platforms
	Knowledge of SEO best practices, Google Analytics, and performance optimization tools
	Familiarity with web hosting, cPanel, Git, and basic server management
	Problem-solving mindset, attention to detail, and ability to meet deadlines


What We Offer


	Competitive salary based on experience
	Opportunity to lead GMYT’s digital presence across multiple brands
	Collaborative and growth-oriented work environment.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV, portfolio links, and brief note on your web management experience to: [email protected] using "Application – Website Developer & Manager" as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "GMYT Group is a multi-division organization driving excellence in Fashion Academy, Retail, Hostel, and Foundation. We tell bold stories through visuals and need a creative who can bring our brands to life.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We&rsquo;re looking for a creative, fast-paced visual storyteller with media house experience to handle all design and video content across GMYT brands.


Key Responsibilities


	Graphics Design: Create flyers, social media creatives, banners, brochures, presentations, and brand assets that align with GMYT&rsquo;s identity.
	Video Editing: Shoot, edit, and produce short-form videos, reels, promos, event highlights, and academic content for online + offline use.
	Brand Consistency: Maintain visual consistency across GMYT Group, Fashion Academy, Store, and Hostel.
	Media House Speed: Work under tight deadlines, manage multiple campaigns, and turn briefs into high-quality output with minimal supervision.
	Content Support: Collaborate with Marketing/Academic teams on daily sales content, campaigns, and product launches.


Requirements


	Experience: 3&ndash;5 years of proven experience working in a media house, agency, or busy in-house creative team. Portfolio required.
	Skills: Strong command of Adobe Creative Suite - Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, After Effects. CapCut/Canva is a plus.
	Eye for Detail: Excellent sense of color, typography, motion graphics, and storytelling.
	Traits: Creative, deadline-driven, team player, and able to take feedback fast.

Note

	GMYT Group Limited is an equal opportunity employer.

Graphics Designer / Video Editor Job at GMYT Group




        
    

        
        GMYT Group is a multi-division organization driving excellence in Fashion Academy, Retail, Hostel, and Foundation. We tell bold stories through visuals and need a creative who can bring our brands to life.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Graphics Designer / Video Editor

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We’re looking for a creative, fast-paced visual storyteller with media house experience to handle all design and video content across GMYT brands.


Key Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Graphics Design: Create flyers, social media creatives, banners, brochures, presentations, and brand assets that align with GMYT’s identity.
	Video Editing: Shoot, edit, and produce short-form videos, reels, promos, event highlights, and academic content for online + offline use.
	Brand Consistency: Maintain visual consistency across GMYT Group, Fashion Academy, Store, and Hostel.
	Media House Speed: Work under tight deadlines, manage multiple campaigns, and turn briefs into high-quality output with minimal supervision.
	Content Support: Collaborate with Marketing/Academic teams on daily sales content, campaigns, and product launches.


Requirements


	Experience: 3–5 years of proven experience working in a media house, agency, or busy in-house creative team. Portfolio required.
	Skills: Strong command of Adobe Creative Suite - Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, After Effects. CapCut/Canva is a plus.
	Eye for Detail: Excellent sense of color, typography, motion graphics, and storytelling.
	Traits: Creative, deadline-driven, team player, and able to take feedback fast.
	Equipment: Personal laptop with editing software. Camera experience is an advantage.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV + portfolio link/Behance/Drive folder to: [email protected], CC: [email protected] using "Graphics Designer & Video Editor – Your Full Name" as the subject of the email.

Note


	Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
	GMYT Group Limited is an equal opportunity employer.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Administrative Assistant",
  "description": "Protea Hotel By Marriot Lagos Kuramo Waters - Experience beautiful beachfront views from our Hotel situated along Kuramo Beach. This serene getaway is ideal for business or leisure guests alike. With state-of-the-art guest rooms and amenities, we ensure a getaway that keeps you in touch with the world while providing a relaxing stay.

We have 60 luxurious rooms with in-room tea/coffee-making facilities and turn-down packages. Protea Hotel Lagos Kuramo Waters facilities include complimentary Wi-Fi access, a gym, a swimming pool, a restaurant, a bar and other commendable amenities.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Assistant
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Administrative Assistant provides administrative and clerical support to ensure the efficient operation of the office.
	The role involves managing correspondence, maintaining records, coordinating schedules, supporting meetings, and assisting with day-to-day office operations to enhance organizational effectiveness.


Key Responsibilities
Administrative Support:


	Provide administrative and clerical support to management and staff.
	Prepare, edit, and format letters, reports, presentations, and other documents.
	Manage incoming and outgoing correspondence, including emails, letters, and phone calls.
	Maintain and organize physical and electronic filing systems.
	Handle confidential information with discretion and professionalism.


Office Management:


	Ensure the office environment is organized, functional, and adequately supplied.
	Monitor office supplies and coordinate procurement when necessary.
	Maintain office equipment and arrange repairs or servicing as required.
	Coordinate courier, mailing, and delivery services.


Scheduling and Coordination:


	Manage calendars, appointments, meetings, and travel arrangements for executives or departments.
	Schedule and coordinate internal and external meetings.
	Prepare meeting agendas, take minutes, and distribute meeting notes.
	Follow up on action items and deadlines arising from meetings.


Records and Data Management:


	Maintain accurate records, databases, and administrative documentation.
	Compile, update, and generate reports as required.
	Ensure proper storage, retrieval, and archiving of documents.
	Assist with data entry and record-keeping activities.


Communication and Customer Service:


	Serve as the first point of contact for visitors, clients, and stakeholders.
	Respond to inquiries and direct them to the appropriate personnel.
	Provide professional customer service and maintain positive relationships with stakeholders.
	Support internal communication initiatives.


General Support:


	Assist with organizing company events, workshops, and training sessions.
	Support departmental projects and administrative activities.
	Perform other duties assigned by management to support business operations.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a B.Sc Degree with 2 - 3 years of experience.&nbsp;


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidate should send their CVs to: hospitalityresources68@gmail.com using the Job Position as the title.",

Administrative Assistant Job at Protea Hotel By Marriot




        
    

        
        Protea Hotel By Marriot Lagos Kuramo Waters - Experience beautiful beachfront views from our Hotel situated along Kuramo Beach. This serene getaway is ideal for business or leisure guests alike. With state-of-the-art guest rooms and amenities, we ensure a getaway that keeps you in touch with the world while providing a relaxing stay.

We have 60 luxurious rooms with in-room tea/coffee-making facilities and turn-down packages. Protea Hotel Lagos Kuramo Waters facilities include complimentary Wi-Fi access, a gym, a swimming pool, a restaurant, a bar and other commendable amenities.
     

            
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Assistant
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Administrative Assistant provides administrative and clerical support to ensure the efficient operation of the office.
	The role involves managing correspondence, maintaining records, coordinating schedules, supporting meetings, and assisting with day-to-day office operations to enhance organizational effectiveness.


Key Responsibilities
Administrative Support:


	Provide administrative and clerical support to management and staff.
	Prepare, edit, and format letters, reports, presentations, and other documents.
	Manage incoming and outgoing correspondence, including emails, letters, and phone calls.
	Maintain and organize physical and electronic filing systems.
	Handle confidential information with discretion and professionalism.


Office Management:


	Ensure the office environment is organized, functional, and adequately supplied.
	Monitor office supplies and coordinate procurement when necessary.
	Maintain office equipment and arrange repairs or servicing as required.
	Coordinate courier, mailing, and delivery services.


Scheduling and Coordination:


	Manage calendars, appointments, meetings, and travel arrangements for executives or departments.
	Schedule and coordinate internal and external meetings.
	Prepare meeting agendas, take minutes, and distribute meeting notes.
	Follow up on action items and deadlines arising from meetings.


Records and Data Management:


	Maintain accurate records, databases, and administrative documentation.
	Compile, update, and generate reports as required.
	Ensure proper storage, retrieval, and archiving of documents.
	Assist with data entry and record-keeping activities.


Communication and Customer Service:


	Serve as the first point of contact for visitors, clients, and stakeholders.
	Respond to inquiries and direct them to the appropriate personnel.
	Provide professional customer service and maintain positive relationships with stakeholders.
	Support internal communication initiatives.


General Support:


	Assist with organizing company events, workshops, and training sessions.
	Support departmental projects and administrative activities.
	Perform other duties assigned by management to support business operations.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a B.Sc Degree with 2 - 3 years of experience. 


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidate should send their CVs to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the title.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Junior Accountant",
  "description": "Jobs Expert, a recruitment services firm, is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Junior Accountant

Job Location: Mushin, Lagos

Job Responsibilities


	Assist in preparing and maintaining financial records, reports, and statements.
	Record daily financial transactions accurately in the accounting system.
	Process invoices, payments, receipts, and expense claims.
	Assist with accounts payable and accounts receivable activities.
	Reconcile bank statements and company accounts regularly.
	Monitor and track petty cash transactions.
	Support payroll preparation and ensure accurate employee payment records.
	Prepare and maintain financial documents and filing systems.
	Assist in budget preparation and expense monitoring.
	Generate periodic financial reports for management review.
	Ensure compliance with company policies and accounting standards.
	Assist during internal and external audits by providing required documentation.
	Monitor outstanding payments and follow up on overdue accounts.
	Support tax preparation and statutory remittance processes.

Junior Accountant Job at Jobs Expert




        
    

        
        Jobs Expert, a recruitment services firm, is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Junior Accountant

Job Location: Mushin, Lagos

Job Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Assist in preparing and maintaining financial records, reports, and statements.
	Record daily financial transactions accurately in the accounting system.
	Process invoices, payments, receipts, and expense claims.
	Assist with accounts payable and accounts receivable activities.
	Reconcile bank statements and company accounts regularly.
	Monitor and track petty cash transactions.
	Support payroll preparation and ensure accurate employee payment records.
	Prepare and maintain financial documents and filing systems.
	Assist in budget preparation and expense monitoring.
	Generate periodic financial reports for management review.
	Ensure compliance with company policies and accounting standards.
	Assist during internal and external audits by providing required documentation.
	Monitor outstanding payments and follow up on overdue accounts.
	Support tax preparation and statutory remittance processes.
	Identify discrepancies in financial records and report them to the Finance Manager.
	Maintain confidentiality of financial information and company records.
	Assist with inventory and asset record management where applicable.
	Perform other accounting and administrative duties as assigned by management.


Key Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree or HND in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.
	0 – 2 years of accounting experience.
	Basic knowledge of accounting principles and financial reporting.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software.
	Strong numerical, analytical, and problem - solving skills.
	High level of accuracy and attention to detail.
	Good communication and organizational skills.
	ICAN / ATS certification or progress toward professional certification is an added advantage.


Salary
N100,000 - N120,000 / month.

Method of Application
